items.title: Automatic i18n Updates from zh-CN in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces automatic translation updates for internationalization (i18n) based on changes from the zh-CN source. New language files have been added for multiple languages, including Arabic, German, and Spanish, enhancing accessibility for a broader audience. Additionally, existing translations have been modified to improve accuracy and clarity.

items.title: Scheduled Research Cycle Report Published in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest research cycle report for April 28, 2026, has been published, featuring a new file with detailed analysis. A total of 14 candidates were reviewed, with key decisions made on tokens like LOL and BURNIE, both recommended to hold. The report also highlights the operational status of all data sources and notes some issues with RugCheck and Solscan.

items.title: New Research Cycle Report Added in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: A new research cycle report has been added, detailing the review of 22 unique mints. Key candidates were assessed, with decisions made to hold or skip based on various signals and confidence levels. Notably, no candidates cleared all gates for buy intents due to identified red flags.
